text.title: cloud-run-vpc-access Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cloud-run-vpc-access as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using Serverless VPC Access connector for new deployments while Direct VPC egress is available in the same region.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Connectors are bottlenecks: a single connector instance supports max 200-300 Mbps and is shared across all services using it. Direct VPC egress eliminates the connector VM, reduces cost, and scales linearly with Cloud Run instances.
